---
name: Content Suggestion
about: Suggest a new topic, case study, or resource to add
title: "[SUGGESTION] "
labels: content-suggestion
assignees: ''
---

## What topic or content are you suggesting?

*Describe the topic, case study, writeup, or resource you would like to see added.*

---

## Which section does it belong in?

- [ ] Technical
- [ ] Explore
- [ ] Case Studies
- [ ] Laws & Privacy
- [ ] School Cybersecurity
- [ ] Resources
- [ ] Other / Not sure

---

## Why does it belong in this repository?

*What makes this topic worth covering here? What would a reader gain from it?*

---

## Do you have sources or references to suggest?

*Links, books, papers, or other materials that cover this topic well.*

---

## Are you willing to contribute the content yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I can write the content and submit a pull request
- [ ] No, I am suggesting it for others to pick up
- [ ] Maybe, depending on scope
